name: Battlemage Gloves
description: Well-trained and experienced mages are a force to be reckoned with, which makes them a prime target on the battlefield. Unsurprisingly, they're always on a lookout for quality armor that doesn't compromise the freedom of movement.
descriptionZh: 修习有素的法师积累了丰富的经验之后，绝对不可小觑，战场上常常是敌人重点关注的目标。正是因为这个，他们经常寻觅优质防具，希望自身的行动不会受到防具影响。
